chunks.title: The Philistine and Israelian Camps
chunks.reason: Describes the positioning of armies and Goliath's challenge.

chunks.title: David Sent to the Camp
chunks.reason: Introduces David and his mission to bring supplies.

chunks.title: David Arrives at the Battle Line
chunks.reason: David arrives, sees Goliath, and inquires about rewards.

chunks.title: Eliab Rebukes David
chunks.reason: David's brother questions his motives before Saul is notified.

chunks.title: David Volunteers to Fight
chunks.reason: David speaks to Saul and recounts his past victories.

chunks.title: David Prepares for Battle
chunks.reason: Saul clothes David, who then chooses his own weapons.

chunks.title: Confrontation with Goliath
chunks.reason: Goliath and David exchange words before the fight.

chunks.title: David Defeats Goliath
chunks.reason: The battle occurs and the Philistines flee.

chunks.title: Saul Questions David's Identity
chunks.reason: Saul asks Abner and David about his lineage.
